<!--
Thanks for the PR! A few notes before you submit:

- For anything beyond a small fix, open an issue first to discuss the direction.
- Keep PRs focused — one concern per PR.
- Run `pytest` and `ruff check .` locally before pushing.
- See CONTRIBUTING.md for full guidelines.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this PR do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- Closes #N — required for new features and non-trivial fixes. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe how you verified the change works. Include test names, manual steps, or screenshots for UI changes. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest`)
- [ ] Lint passes locally (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change (when applicable)
- [ ] I updated the README, docstrings, or FAQ if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] I did not add new dependencies without justification in the PR description
- [ ] I did not log user-supplied content (queries, memory text) — only IDs and metadata

## Screenshots (UI changes only)
